subject: [LOG] Disable log in "onap-all"
commit_message:
[LOG] Disable log in "onap-all"

Log is not a component which will be part of the release.
As such, we don't start it even in "all" ONAP.

Issue-ID: OOM-2370
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I0238632a3a62ad7cfeee3656afc74144a6337c46

entries.message:

Dmaap issue is certificate retrieval issue

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> @Sylvain
> What happens with all those projects that happen to use logging project using their sidecar containers (like appc for example)? Shouldn't we have "loggingEnabled" flag so that we even don't start the sidecar when logging is not enabled?

I thought about it but was too lazy to do...

Patch Set 1:
